answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving problems & thinking analytically
Data analysis, AI, or machine learning

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data scientist to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
DeepLearning.AI TensorFlow Developer Professional Certificate
HarvardX's Professional Certificate in Data Science
Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng (Coursera)

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), machine learning algorithms, and statistical modelling — these are the essential building blocks for a data scientist

resources.title: DeepLearning.AI Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng (Coursera)
Databases and SQL for Data Science with Python (IBM on Coursera)
Khan Academy: Statistics and Probability
Kaggle Learn: Pandas Micro-Course
Python Data Science Handbook by Jake VanderPlas (Online Book)

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in data visualisation, sql and databases, and feature engineering, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Deep Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng (Coursera)
Machine Learning Engineering for Production (MLOps) Specialization (Coursera)
Practical Deep Learning for Coders by fast.ai
Apache Spark Programming with Python Course (Databricks Academy)
Reinforcement Learning Specialization (University of Alberta, Coursera)

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), and machine learning algorithms in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Kaggle Learn - Hands-on Data Science Tutorials
IBM Applied Data Science Capstone on Coursera
DataCamp Data Scientist Career Track (with projects)
Scikit-learn Official User Guide & Examples
Streamlit - Build & Share Data Apps (Official Docs & Tutorials)

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

resources.title: Streamlit Documentation & Tutorials (Building Interactive Data Apps)
GitHub Guides: Writing Effective READMEs for Data Science Projects
Kaggle Learn: Hands-on Data Science & Machine Learning Tutorials
Coursera: Machine Learning Engineering for Production (MLOps) Specialization
Coursera: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate (Focus on Capstone Project)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data scientist skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Optimizing Your LinkedIn Profile
How to Create a Data Science Resume (With Examples!)
How To Build A Stellar Data Science Portfolio
How To Build a Strong GitHub Portfolio For Data Science
What is ATS (Applicant Tracking System)? And How to Beat It

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for data scientist positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

resources.title: Search: data scientist Job Application / Freelancing resources
Search: data scientist Job Application / Freelancing courses

milestones.title: Skill Building & Practice
milestones.description:
Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in data visualisation, sql and databases, and feature engineering, applying them through exercises and case studies

Then: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), and machine learning algorithms in realistic scenarios

Then: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data scientist skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators
